1.label: Welfare
1.desc: Financial inclusion tools; productivity may lift wages but direct poverty reduction unproven

2.label: Health
2.desc: AI-assisted screening: 17-29% higher cancer detection. Estonia's 99% digital health records ideal.

3.label: Education
3.desc: Short-term tutoring gains (g=0.70) but effects decay sharply (g=0.08). Long-term impact unproven.

4.label: Environment
4.desc: AI energy optimization vs AI's own consumption. No lifecycle assessment exists.

5.label: R&D & Enterprise
5.desc: Productivity gap is binding constraint. 14-26% task gains. AlphaFold: +45% protein submissions.
5.ai5: SME productivity gains; research tool adoption

6.label: Agriculture
6.desc: Precision agriculture, crop optimization. Moderate evidence base.

7.label: Transport
7.desc: ADAS: 23.8% accident reduction. Singapore traffic AI: -20% delays, -15% emissions.

8.label: Energy
8.desc: Grid optimization potential but AI's own energy demand is a countervailing force.

9.label: Info Society
9.desc: Digital infrastructure + AI = expanded service reach. High existing digital literacy.

10.label: Effective State
10.desc: Proactive services at 99.99% automation. Bürokratt conversational gov. 60-80% cost reduction per interaction.
10.ai10: Preventive governance — detecting need before application

11.label: Internal Security
11.desc: Predictive policing shows promise but bias risks. ADAS safety gains measurable.

13.label: Security & Defence
13.desc: AI threat detection 98% accuracy, saves $1.76M/breach. But AI phishing: 54% vs 12% click rates.
13.ai10: Continuous arms race; defence must keep pace

14.label: Culture & Sports
14.desc: Estonian-language AI viability is existential. 4B-word corpus creates a window for digital vitality.
14.ai5: Estonian-capable AI models reach functional parity
14.ai10: AI either preserves or ends Estonian as professional language

15.label: Cohesive Society
15.desc: Demographics technology-resistant (fertility 1.31). AI may widen not narrow social gaps.
15.ai10: Regional/social disparities may widen without intervention
